# nuphirho

nuphirho.dev is the home of Christo Zietsman — technologist, engineering leader, and writer.

## About

Christo Zietsman has 20+ years of experience spanning mine seismology, antenna design expert systems, enterprise backup, and cybersecurity. He holds a Masters in Continuum Mechanics (Cum Laude, Stellenbosch University) and currently leads technology innovation at CyberSentriq.

The name nuphirho comes from the Greek letters nu, phi, and rho — rooted in physics and mathematics. It reflects intellectual curiosity and engineering rigour.

## Pages

- Home: https://nuphirho.dev/
- About: https://nuphirho.dev/about
- Novel Findings: https://nuphirho.dev/novel-findings
- Roadmap: https://nuphirho.dev/roadmap
- Words of Meaning: https://nuphirho.dev/words-of-meaning
- Blog: https://blog.nuphirho.dev
